ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the employee */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "maritalstatus" TEXT /* Marital status of the employee */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the employee works in */,
  "jobrole" TEXT /* Job role of the employee */,
  "joblevel" INTEGER /* Job level of the employee */,
  "attrition" TEXT /* Attrition status of the employee */,
  "distancefromhome" INTEGER /* Distance from home to work */,
  "education" INTEGER /* Education level of the employee */,
  "educationfield" INTEGER /* Field of education of the employee */,
  "businesstravel" TEXT /* Business travel frequency of the employee */,
  "totalworkingyears" TEXT /* Total working years of the employee */,
  "yearsatcompany" INTEGER /* Years at the current company */,
  "yearssincelastpromotion" INTEGER /* Years since the last promotion */,
  "yearswithcurrmanager" INTEGER /* Years with the current manager */,
  "environmentsatisfaction" INTEGER /* Environment satisfaction level of the employee */,
  "jobsatisfaction" INTEGER /* Job satisfaction level of the employee */,
  "worklifebalance" INTEGER /* Work-life balance satisfaction level of the employee */,
  "jobinvolvement" INTEGER /* Job involvement level of the employee */,
  "performancerating" INTEGER /* Performance rating of the employee */,
  "monthlyincome" INTEGER /* Monthly income of the employee */,
  "numcompaniesworked" INTEGER /* Number of companies worked at */,
  "percentsalaryhike" INTEGER /* Percent salary hike */,
  "stockoptionlevel" INTEGER /* Stock option level of the employee */,
  "trainingtimeslastyear" INTEGER /* Number of training times in the last year */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date of hire */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date of termination (if applicable) */,
  "reason_for_leaving" TEXT /* Reason for leaving (if applicable) */,
  "last_performance_review_date" TEXT /* Date of last performance review */,
  "next_performance_review_date" TEXT /* Scheduled date of next performance review */,
  "career_aspirations" TEXT /* Employee career aspirations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_jobrole FOREIGN KEY ("jobrole") REFERENCES job_roles ("job_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_department FOREIGN KEY ("department") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_businesstravel FOREIGN KEY ("businesstravel") REFERENCES businesstravel_frequencies ("travel_freq_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_educationfield FOREIGN KEY ("educationfield") REFERENCES education_fields ("educationfield_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager overseeing the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_roles" (
  "job_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job role */,
  "job_role_name" TEXT /* Name of the job role */,
  "job_role_description" TEXT /* Description of the job role */,
  "required_skills" TEXT /* Required skills and qualifications for the job role */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the job role belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_fields" (
  "educationfield_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each field of education */,
  "educationfield_name" TEXT /* Name of the field of education */,
  "education_field_description" TEXT /* Description of the field of education */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("educationfield_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "businesstravel_frequencies" (
  "travel_freq_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business travel frequency */,
  "travel_freq_name" TEXT /* Name of the business travel frequency */,
  "travel_frequency_description" TEXT /* Description of the business travel frequency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("travel_freq_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_programs" (
  "training_program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training program */,
  "training_program_name" TEXT /* Name of the training program */,
  "training_program_description" TEXT /* Description of the training program */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the training program (in days) */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost of the training program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_training_history" (
  "employee_training_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee training history record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "training_program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training program */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date of completion */,
  "evaluation_score" TEXT /* Evaluation score (out of 100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_training_history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "performance_review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance review record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance review */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating (out of 100) */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from the performance review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_goals" (
  "employee_goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee goal record */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "goal_description" TEXT /* Description of the goal */,
  "target_date" TEXT /* Target date for achieving the goal */,
  "progress" TEXT /* Progress towards achieving the goal (out of 100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_goal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managerial_hierarchy" (
  "managerial_hierarchy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each managerial hierarchy record */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee reporting to the manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("managerial_hierarchy_id")
)
